title: PaperCatalogue
description: Output of the citation-traverse step: metadata for all papers discovered, keyed by DOI. role distinguishes the primary atlas paper from cited papers.

authors.description: Author string, e.g. 'Gopee NH et al.'

first_author.description: Surname of first author — used for inline citations.

pmid.description: PubMed ID, or null if unavailable.

pmcid.description: PubMed Central ID, or null if unavailable.

role.description: primary_atlas: the atlas paper being reported on. cited_by_atlas: a paper referenced in the traversal.
